message:
feat(fcp-core): make archetypes/supported_zones Option to stop inventing defaults

ConnectorDescriptor now uses Option<Vec<String>> for archetypes and
supported_zones so that unknown state (None) is distinguishable from
explicitly-empty state (Some(vec![])). Updates readiness.rs consumer
and fixes pre-existing _best_row unused variable in fcp-raptorq decoder.

Beads: 1g7z0.29.6.1

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
